messages.content:
Hi, i want a name for my brand, include these names: ''kimiya'' ''gewelry'' 
it will be a jewelry shop
How about "Kimiya Gewelry Boutique"?
nope, want a short name
How about "Kimiya Gems"?

no, mix them up
need it for brand
How about "Kiger Jewelry"? (Combining the first two letters of each name)
no
How about "Gemiya Jewelry"? (Switching the first letters of each name)
no
How about "Kijewel" or "Kimewelry"? (Combining parts of each name)
no
How about "Gelya Kimiya"? (Rearranging the letters of the names)
nope
How about "KimiJewels"?
no
How about "Gewiya Jewelry"?
How about "Kimy's Jewelry"?
How about "Kimiya Gems & Jewels"?
How about "Kimiya Bijoux"? (Bijoux means jewelry in French and it includes the name Kimiya)
How about "Gewiya Collections"? (combining "Gewelry" and "Kimiya" and using "Collections" to show that it's a jewelry shop)
How about "Kimiya Treasures"? (using "Kimiya" as the main brand name and "Treasures" to convey the value of the jewelry being sold)
How about "Gewya Gems"? (combining "Gewelry" and "Kimiya" and using "Gems" to describe the jewelry sold)
How about "Kimya Co."? (a shortened version of "Kimiya" and "Co." to signify that it's a company specializing in jewelry)
How about "Gewya Co."? (a shortened version of "Gewelry" and "Kimiya" and "Co." to signify that it's a company specializing in gems and jewelry)
How about "Kimiya Jewels Co."? (it combines the two names and includes the word "Jewels" to convey that it's a jewelry company)
